de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.boollattice

Class BooleanDomainElem

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.boollattice.BooleanDomainElem
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Bottom, False, Top, True

    public abstract class BooleanDomainElem
extends AbstractDomainElement
    A domain element of the simple boolean lattice.
    Author:
    Dominic Scheurer

    • Method Detail

      • isBottom

        public boolean isBottom()
        Returns:
        true iff this element is the bottom element.

      • isFalse

        public boolean isFalse()
        Returns:
        true iff this element is the false element.

      • isTrue

        public boolean isTrue()
        Returns:
        true iff this element is the true element.

        Returns:
        true iff this element is the top element.
